cafe.name: The Morning Rush
cafe.description: Regulars at the corner café each ordered a different drink and a different pastry one busy morning. Work out who had what.
clues: Between Almond and Toffee, one goes with Dane and the other with Donut.
Either Felix goes with Maple or Ava goes with Rose.
Toffee, Amber, and $12 go with Cara, Danish, and Donut, in some order.
If at least one of Chai does not go with Almond, Tart does not go with Caramel, or Donut goes with Amber, then either Latte goes with Ivory or Latte does not go with $18 (but not both).
Almond goes with exactly four of Dane, Chai, Danish, Amber, and $16.
The Espresso order's price is higher than both the order with the Danish and the order with Toffee syrup.
Cobalt goes with exactly two of Chai, Donut, Caramel, and $18.
Either Macchiato goes with $16, or Donut goes with Maple — but not both.
Dane's price is lower than both the order with the Tart and the order in the Rose mug.

space.name: The Mars Colony
space.description: The first colonists of a new Mars settlement each took a different role and hail from a different world. Work out who's who.
clues: Between Callisto and Titan, one goes with Dasari and the other with Echo.
Either Fontaine goes with Ganymede or Anders goes with Plankton.
Titan, Algae, and 14 ly go with Cho, Drift, and Echo, in some order.
If at least one of Captain does not go with Callisto, Lumen does not go with Ceres, or Echo goes with Algae, then either Medic goes with Fungus or Medic does not go with 20 ly (but not both).
Callisto goes with exactly four of Dasari, Captain, Drift, Algae, and 18 ly.

Either Navigator goes with 18 ly, or Echo goes with Ganymede — but not both.
Dasari's distance is lower than both the colonist in the Lumen module and the colonist studying Plankton.
